separation_controls: Separate branding, domains and customer-facing identities.
Separate ledgers, bank accounts, tax treatment and financial reporting unless advisers approve a documented structure.
Separate supplier terms, product ownership, warranties, returns and liabilities.
Separate customer and lead permissions and suppression records.
No cross-use of confidential data without a recorded purpose and lawful basis.
truth_boundary: This is a governance and architecture scaffold. It does not prove either business is deployed or operational.
